backend/main.mo: Empty Motoko actor serving as the backend entry point with no implemented functionality.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping the 'Pre-Launch' messaging update feature to the SubsidiaryDetails and SubsidiaryGrid components with high confidence.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-line summaries of all frontend source files describing their purpose and key implementation details.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry file defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark color themes including sidebar, chart, and UI tokens.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the Luminia Group React app, mounting the app at the root div and loading the main TypeScript entry point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that composes the full page layout by rendering WelcomePopup, Navigation, HeroSection, ManifestoSection, SubsidiaryGrid, and Footer on a black background.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Premium black-and-gold footer displaying the Luminia logo, a portfolio brand list, contact links, and a caffeine.ai attribution with a dynamic copyright year.
frontend/src/components/HeroSection.tsx: Full-screen hero section featuring a background image with gold overlays, large Cormorant Garamond typography, a diamond divider, and a CTA button that smooth-scrolls to the subsidiaries section.
frontend/src/components/ManifestoSection: Scroll-animated manifesto section with a radial gold glow, an italic blockquote, decorative divider rules, and a stats row showing subsidiaries, ambition, and vision.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Sticky navigation header with the Luminia logo, scroll-aware background blur, desktop nav links with hover effects, and an animated mobile hamburger menu.
A 'Coming Soon' full-screen placeholder page for Luminia Group with fade-in animation, gold decorative elements, and a footer attribution link.
frontend/src/components/SubsidiaryDetail: A modal overlay component that displays detailed information and an image carousel for a selected Luminia subsidiary, with keyboard navigation and animated entrance/exit transitions.
frontend/src/components/SubsidiaryGrid.t: Defines the Subsidiary data type and a static list of seven Luminia subsidiaries, rendering them as a scroll-animated grid with click-to-open detail modals via SubsidiaryDetails.
frontend/src/components/WelcomePopup.tsx: A full-screen welcome splash popup shown once per session, featuring animated gold particles, staggered letter-by-letter headline reveal, and a burst animation on the enter button.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, recreating it when the Internet Identity changes and invalidating dependent queries accordingly.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider context and useInternetIdentity hook for managing DFINITY AuthClient login, logout, and identity state with status tracking.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: An empty module placeholder indicating no backend queries are needed for this static corporate website.
frontend/src/hooks/useScrollAnimation.ts: A reusable hook that uses IntersectionObserver to toggle an isVisible boolean when a referenced element enters the viewport, supporting configurable threshold and one-time triggering.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet importing Cormorant Garamond font and Tailwind, defining a dark gold-on-obsidian design system with CSS custom properties, scrollbar/selection styles, and keyframe animations (particle fall, shimmer, gold burst, etc.).
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that mounts the app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers around the root App component.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind configuration extending the theme with custom gold/obsidian/ivory color palettes, Cormorant Garamond fonts, zero border-radius defaults, luxury box shadows, and matching keyframe animations.
project_state.json: Project state metadata for 'Luminia Group' tracking schema version, existing features, and a completed request to replace 'Launching Soon' labels with pre-launch messaging across subsidiary modals.
